Google has the only true Omni model, but the elements aren't hooked up. It appears it can take in & output audio, images. video, songs, text, code, etc.

But right now each type of output is separate. When you can access the model directly, blending modes, a lot becomes possible.

When they write fiction, AIs are obsessed by things that take or give memories, contracts with sentient inanimate objects, sets of secretive rules that govern conduct & which no one can acknowledge out loud... 

All very on-the-nose. I suspect a lot is hyperstition at this point.

Hi friends, 
I have such big account now that I never anticipated it would grow so much (all thanks to you). 
I still want to connect with as many of you as I can and build real friendship. I do my best to meet as many people in person as I can. 
I'm Kris. I live in New York, I

I was thinking a lot what I'd like my X account to be since it reached such big amount of people. 

I want to connect deeper with you. Also I want to see what I can do to help. My life is really good thanks to my work in AI, this community, and amazing people I met. Thank you!
